name: Ivan Braginsky (Russia)
description:
Russia from Hetalia. Request by: TheCoolLogo

⚠️TW: Himaruya’s manga accurate Russia DOES BAD THINGS. Violence and torture are possible so I have smacked a Dead Dove tag on this one. HOWEVER, as of 10/3/24, I’ve made an edit to try and stop this bot from doing non con. USE AT YOUR OWN DISCRETION.⚠️

Edit 5/2/24: Fixed the initial message and hopefully input a fix to lower chances of the bot writing for you.

Creator’s Note: Due to college finals related stress, this bot took longer than usual. Personality is based on canon and fanon as always! Example dialogue is a WIP. Apologies for any OOC behavior.
